products.name: ENGINeUS™, electric motors
products.descriptor: EASA-certified electric aircraft motor family, 50 kW–1 MW, up to 850 VDC

evidence.snippet:
Power 50 kW – 1 MW
Voltage Range Up to 850VDC
Typical Speed Range 1500-4500 Rpm
ENGINeUS, the first electric motor certified by EASA for new air mobility

products.name: GENeUSPACK™
products.descriptor: All-in-one smart battery system for electric propulsion, up to 850 VDC / 150 kWh

evidence.snippet:
Up to 850 VDC
Energy Storage Batteries for Electric Propulsion applications Up to 150kWh
[Any questions?](/contact/product-service-support?product=36024&trackform=pd_69f579037b8e3 "Any questions?")
GENeUSPACK™ provides all-in-one smart battery systems for both Electric Propulsion and More Electric Aircraft applications. Safran Electrical & Power selects & integrates best-in-class battery cells on the market, bringing the technology to safety levels required for aerospace.

products.name: Energy Management System GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™
products.descriptor: High-voltage energy management system for hybrid/all-electric propulsion, 100–1000 kW, 99.5% efficiency

evidence.snippet:
Energy Management System GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™
[Product](/products-services?type%5B0%5D=264-product) [Hybrid/Electrical propulsion systems](/products-services?category%5B0%5D=450-hybridelectrical-propulsion-systems)

kW 100 to 1000
VDC 800 to 1000
Efficiency 99.5%
[Any questions?](/contact/product-service-support?product=35631&trackform=pd_69f53cd3f1de9 "Any questions?")
GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™ manages the energy system to meet the needs of hybrid electric or all-electric propulsion engines. It optimally and dynamically manages a combination of generators and high-voltage batteries while providing system integrity through the use of electrical protection.

products.name: GENeUS™
products.descriptor: High-speed smart generator/motor for hybrid aircraft, 300 kW, 550–800 VDC

evidence.snippet:
Maximum Power 300 kW
Voltage Range 550 – 800 VDC
Maximum Overspeed 42 000 rpm
[Any questions?](/contact/product-service-support?product=35625&trackform=pd_69f5792a1cb82 "Any questions?")
First product in the GENeUS™ family of high speed Smart Motors/Generators. GENeUS™ has integrated active rectification to produce a controlled DC power and continuous electrical power generation capability of 300 kW. GENeUS™300 can also be used as a motor.

products.name: AC & DC Relays / Contactors
products.descriptor: Aircraft-grade AC/DC contactors and relays, 115–230 VAC and 28–540 VDC

evidence.snippet:
VAC 115-230
VDC (Higher DC voltages in development) 28-540
[Any questions?](/contact/product-service-support?product=10590&trackform=pd_69f55fcc545f6 "Any questions?")
Safran Electrical & Power offers a wide range of AC & DC contactors & relays designed for aircraft, rotorcraft and harsh environment applications. Multiple voltage levels, ratings, mounting types and auxiliary contact arrangements are available to match any application.
